CheckTitle: 检查RDS 实例s are protected by a 备份 plan.
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks, AWS Security Best Practices
Description: 检查RDS 实例s are protected by a 备份 plan.
Risk: 如果没有a 备份 plan, RDS 实例s are vulnerable to data loss, accidental deletion, or corruption. This could lead to significant operational disruptions or loss of critical data.

Code.CLI: aws backup create-backup-plan --backup-plan , aws backup tag-resource --resource-arn <rds-instance-arn> --tags Key=backup,Value=true

Recommendation.Text: Create a 备份 plan for the RDS 实例 to protect it from data loss, accidental deletion, or corruption.
